title: Orlando Heat Wave
lead: Orlando is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.06. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Orlando has reached critical levels, with a Z-Score of +4.06, significantly above the average. 
 The high temperature is causing a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD) at 13.2 GG, while the humidity is at 54% and wind speed is 13.6 km/h. 
 The Heat Wave is expected to continue, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded, emphasizing the need for caution and preparedness.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
